channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Top Nigerian Celebrities Shine in Stylish Traditional Outfits at 2026 AMVCA
item.description: Last Saturday for Lagos, na serious display of fashion and culture as stars gather for the 2026 Africa Magic Viewers’ Choice Awards (AMVCA) Cultural Night for Eko Hotel and Suites, Victoria Island. Di...

item.title: Gigi Hadid’s Met Gala gown was finalized just two days before the event
item.description: Gigi Hadid stunned attendees at the Met Gala once again with a custom Miu Miu gown that featured hotfix crystals, floral embroidery, and flame-inspired patchwork. The dress, however, almost didn’t com...

item.title: Daily Wage Earners Account for Nearly One-Third of Suicides in India in 2024: NCRB Report
item.description: According to the National Crime Records Bureau (NCRB) data for 2024, daily wage earners accounted for 31% of all suicide deaths in India, marking the highest proportion in a decade. In total, 52,910 c...

item.title: Comelec plans to finalize online voting and results transmission contracts before year-end for 2028 polls
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) announced plans to award contracts for the Online Voting, Counting System (OVCS) and Secure Electronic Transmission Services (SETS) before the end of 2026 as part...

item.title: Supreme Court plans mediation centre to promote alternative dispute resolution in Pakistan
item.description: Justice Miangul Hassan Aurangzeb has highlighted the importance of alternative dispute resolution (ADR) in Pakistan’s judicial system, urging courts to refer more cases to mediation. Speaking at the l...

item.title: Farrer Byelection Highlights Potential Risks for Labor and the Rise of One Nation
item.description: The Farrer byelection revealed significant challenges for the Labor Party despite their absence from the contest. With no Labor candidate, a large portion of previous Labor voters dispersed unpredicta...

item.title: Ilebaye’s father alleges financial and personal disagreements with BBNaija star
item.description: Emmanuel Godson Odiniya, papa of Big Brother Naija All Stars winner Ilebaye Odiniya, don talk about wahala wey dey between am and him pikin. For one audio wey journalist Jeremiah Promise Enemona drop ...

item.title: 25 sacrificial goats stolen from Karachi plot in Gulistan-i-Jauhar
item.description: In Karachi’s Gulistan-i-Jauhar, a theft of 25 sacrificial goats valued at Rs1.9 million has shocked locals. According to SHO Agha Abdul Rasheed of Malir Cantt police, a man had bought these goats and ...

item.title: Eskom Extends Public Comment Period on Proposed Nuclear Sites Amid Concerns About Scope and Cost
item.description: Eskom has extended the public comment period on its Draft Environmental Scoping Report for a proposed 5,200MW nuclear power plant by three weeks, now closing on 25 May. The extension comes after inten...

item.title: Three arrested in connection with the murder of West Bengal CM’s aide
item.description: Authorities have apprehended three individuals in Bihar and Uttar Pradesh in connection with the killing of Chandranath Rath, an aide to West Bengal Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari. Rath was fatally s...

item.title: Canadian Voters Maintain Support for Carney Despite U.S. Presidential Changes, Poll Shows
item.description: A recent poll by Abacus Data suggests that a change in U.S. presidential leadership would not significantly alter Canadian voting intentions. Despite Donald Trump's unpopularity in Canada due to trade...

item.title: Government calls on private sector to increase funding in water projects
item.description: The Tanzanian government is urging the private sector to step up investment in the country's water sector. Officials highlighted the urgent need to improve water infrastructure and ensure reliable acc...

item.title: Eldoret Road to Close for Four Months for Nairobi River Bridge Construction
item.description: Motorists in Nairobi should brace for significant traffic disruptions as the Kenya Urban Roads Authority (KURA) has announced a four-month closure of a section of Eldoret Road. This closure will run f...

item.title: Weekly Fuel Price Update: Diesel and Kerosene Rollbacks, Gasoline Prices Rise
item.description: As of May 11, 2026, the latest fuel price monitoring for Metro Manila shows mixed trends. Diesel and kerosene are expected to have rollbacks on May 12, offering some relief to motorists, while gasolin...

item.title: UK Nationals from Hantavirus-Affected Cruise Ship Quarantined in Hospital
item.description: A chartered flight has returned 20 British nationals from the HV Hondius cruise ship, which was affected by a hantavirus outbreak, to the UK. They arrived at Manchester Airport from Tenerife and were ...

item.title: Karachi weather remains hot and humid, Sindh faces upcoming heatwave
item.description: According to the Pakistan Meteorological Department (PMD), Karachi will continue experiencing hot and humid conditions in the coming days, with daytime temperatures around 36 to 37°C. The influence of...

item.title: Alan Cayetano elected as new Senate president amid looming Sara Duterte impeachment
item.description: On May 11, 2026, Senator Alan Cayetano was elected as the new Senate president, replacing Senator Tito Sotto. The leadership change occurs at a critical time as the country faces the impending impeach...

item.title: Supreme Court launches 'One Case One Data' initiative and AI chatbot to streamline court services
item.description: On May 11, 2026, Chief Justice of India Surya Kant unveiled a significant digital initiative to enhance judicial data management and public access to court services. Named the 'One Case One Data' init...

item.title: Tanzania Congratulates Djibouti President Ismaïl Omar Guelleh on Sixth Term
item.description: Tanzania, through its Minister for Foreign Affairs and East African Cooperation, Mahmoud Thabit Kombo, officially represented President Samia Suluhu Hassan at the inauguration of Djibouti President Is...

item.title: Linda Ejiofor and Uzor Arukwe Win Top Awards at 2026 AMVCA
item.description: The 2026 Africa Magic Viewers' Choice Awards (AMVCA) don celebrate top Nollywood talent wey shine for 2025 movies. Linda Ejiofor make history as she clinch both Best Lead Actress and Best Supporting A...
